product: Lakebase Autoscaling now available in three additional regions
tagline: Lakebase Autoscaling is now available in three additional regions: ca central 1 (Canada Central) eu west 2 (Europe – London) sa east 1 (South America – São Paulo) See Get started with Lakebase…
what_it_does: Lakebase Autoscaling is now available in three additional regions: ca central 1 (Canada Central) eu west 2 (Europe – London) sa east 1 (South America – São Paulo) See Get started with Lakebase Autoscaling. By the end of this guide, you'll have a running Postgres database with sample data, ready to connect to your application or integrate with the Databricks lakehouse. Steps: ① Create a project → ② Connect → ③ Create a table Step 1: Create your first project Open the Lakebase App from the apps switcher.
why_it_matters: The compute for the production branch has scale to zero enabled by default with a 24 hour inactivity timeout, but you can configure this setting if needed.
